sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to exercise, practice, be busy with, carry on
3. to manage public affairs, transact public business. to exact tribute, revenue, debts
5. how I do, the state of my affairs

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: A primary verb; to “practise”, that is, perform repeatedly or habitually (thus differing from G4160, which properly refers to a single act); by implication to execute, accomplish, etc.; specifically to collect (dues), fare (personally): - commit, deeds, do, exact, keep, require, use arts.
